scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:app && npm run typecheck:playwright
scripts.spellcheck:all: npm run spellcheck && npm run build && npm run spellcheck:html
scripts.validate:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run spellcheck && npm run lint:prose && npm run test:vale && npm run build && npm run spellcheck:html && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:feed
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run spellcheck && npm run lint:prose && npm run test:vale && npm run build && npm run spellcheck:html && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:feed
scripts.test:ci:verbose: echo '🔍 Running CI validation locally...' && npm run lint && echo '✓ Linting passed' && npm run typecheck && echo '✓ Type check (TypeScript 7) passed' && npm run test:unit && echo '✓ Unit tests passed' && npm run spellcheck && echo '✓ Source spell check passed' && npm run lint:prose && echo '✓ Prose lint passed' && npm run test:vale && echo '✓ Vale fixture tests passed' && npm run build && echo '✓ Build succeeded' && npm run spellcheck:html && echo '✓ HTML spell check passed' && npm run validate:links && echo '✓ Link validation passed' && npm run validate:feed && echo '✓ Feed validation passed' && echo '✅ All CI checks passed!'
